description: Versigent PLC designs, manufactures, and distributes low- and high-voltage power electrical architectures. The company offers signal and data connectivity solutions, power distribution systems, high-voltage electrical distribution systems, and EV charging solutions. It serves the automotive, commercial vehicle, energy and grid, and other industries. The company was founded in 2026 and is based in Schaffhausen, Switzerland. Versigent PLC operates independently of Aptiv PLC as of April 1, 2026.
